title: Rate Me Rotten
behavioural_loop: checks the phone, pretends indifference, checks again
task: Return strict JSON only. No markdown, no prose wrapper. Required keys: core_wound, behavioural_loop, objects, held_ambiguity, visual_world, anti_cliches, identity_invariants_preserved, frame_prompts, video_concepts. identity_invariants_preserved must be an array containing the exact tokens: agency, dignity, hierarchy, danger (lowercase, one entry each). frame_prompts must contain 12 items. video_concepts must contain 3 items. Phone must function as relapse/validation object in cramped night kitchen with domestic evidence. Reject generic gothic styling and helpless-victim framing.
